title: Mental Health Aspect Counsellors
content: Counselling Services A. Offline Counsellors Dr. Shalini Dhadwal Psychologist (23 years of experience) Certified Life Coach | CBT | Art Therapy | Mindfulness | Family Constellation Contact : 9418458460 Email : shaliniddhadwal@gmail.com Available at JUIT : Monday, Wednesday & Friday | 5:00 – 7:00 PM Ms. Aman Psychological Counsellor & Behaviour Therapist Experienced University Students Counsellor with expertise in psychological counselling, behavioural guidance, and student wellbeing. Worked as a Student Counsellor under CBSE In Government Education Institute and with experience in schools, colleges, and counselling for all age groups. Qualifications: M.A. Psychology, B.A. Psychology, B.Ed (Education Psychology), PG Diploma in Guidance & Behaviour Modification Therapy, PG Diploma in Yog Vigyan Manavchetna,Yoga Therapist PG Diploma in Psychology.
